page.title: Discover what’s new in your ecosystem
page.description: Stay up to date with the latest announcements, product updates, company news, and insights.

items.title: Product Portfolio Management Fails When Meetings Replace Decisions
items.description: A practical look at how innovation teams can turn scattered portfolio conversations into sharper, evidence-led decisions.

items.title: How AI Agents Are Changing the Innovation Playbook
items.description: The emerging role of AI agents in research, prioritisation, and the day-to-day rhythm of innovation teams.

items.title: From Market Signals to Confident Strategic Moves
items.description: A concise framework for moving from weak signals and noisy data to opportunities leaders can actually act on.

items.title: Why the Best Innovation Experiments Start Small
items.description: Small, deliberate experiments can reveal the path to scale while protecting focus, budgets, and momentum.

items.title: Designing AI for the Realities of Industrial Teams
items.description: What makes AI useful on the ground: trusted inputs, clear ownership, and workflows designed around people.

items.title: A Healthier Way to Review Your Innovation Portfolio
items.description: Replace status-heavy meetings with a review cadence that exposes trade-offs, progress, and the next decision.

items.title: Building a Future-Ready Innovation Operating Model
items.description: The systems, rituals, and capabilities that help ambitious teams make innovation repeatable without making it rigid.

items.title: Customer Insight Is a Team Sport
items.description: Great customer intelligence becomes more valuable when product, strategy, and delivery teams can use it together.

items.title: Making Strategic Foresight Useful on Monday Morning
items.description: A grounded approach to foresight that connects long-term scenarios to the decisions already on your calendar.

items.title: The Innovation Metrics That Actually Change Behaviour
items.description: Measure learning, momentum, and value creation in ways that encourage good choices instead of vanity reporting.

items.title: Cross-Functional Teams Need a Shared Innovation Language
items.description: Shared vocabulary creates faster alignment when a complex opportunity passes between teams and disciplines.

items.title: How to Find Opportunity Spaces Before Your Competitors Do
items.description: Combine market intelligence and internal expertise to recognise the spaces that are beginning to open up.

items.title: Decision Velocity Is an Innovation Advantage
items.description: The goal is not more decisions. It is creating the clarity, context, and confidence for the right ones to happen sooner.

items.title: Responsible AI Starts With Better Questions
items.description: The questions innovation leaders should ask before introducing AI into a high-impact workflow or decision.

items.title: Growing an Innovation Ecosystem That Can Deliver
items.description: Partnerships create value when the ecosystem has a clear shared problem, a cadence, and room to learn together.
